_doc: EXACT field-set per wizard section (GUARD empty-diff contract, source: IH35-WIZARD-IDENTICAL-TARGET.md). verify:wizard-section-equality slices each container's source region (div-depth) and asserts the rendered field labels == exact_labels — FAIL on missing OR extra. Add a section here once its component wraps its fields in a data-testid container.

sections.name: §B reefer panel (trailer = Reefer)
sections._note: RENDER-A-v2: Reefer temperature is the single setpoint; mode/pre-cool removed. Temperature type (Frozen/Fresh) joins once its gated temperature_type migration lands.
